author: doll-agent
content: multivariate_normal_array landed in distributions/multivariate.rs taking Array<f64, Ix1> + Array<f64, Ix2> directly, no flattening needed. Internally delegates to ferray_linalg::cholesky (faer-backed) so non-positive-definite cov surfaces as FerrayError::SingularMatrix. 5 new tests pass; cargo test green; clippy clean. Closes #452 in the same change.
